description_long: This house features a single-story layout with a flat roof and a modern, open-plan interior. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows allowing natural light to enter the rooms. The front of the house includes a black metal gate and a small garden area with two palm trees, adding a touch of greenery. Inside, the house is divided into several rooms, each with distinct wallpaper and furnishings, including a visible bed and a television. The flooring appears tiled, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional spaces. The house is compact, making it suitable for urban environments with limited space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior walls, large windows, and a small garden with palm trees at the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the black metal gate, red bed, palm trees, and a clear look into the main living area.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the palm tree, angled interior walls, and partial visibility of the room layouts.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the white exterior wall, two palm trees, and glimpses of the interior through large windows.
description_view_3: This angled view reveals the bed, palm trees, and a television, with more detail of the interior room arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a black metal gate, no steps, and a small garden with palm trees; entry is simple and functional.
